name: kronia
description: KRONIA — Sistema de Gestão Fisiológica e Periodização

scripts.system:check: sh -c 'if command -v tsx >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsx scripts/system-check.ts; else npm run -s system:check:legacy; fi'
scripts.system:check:legacy: tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module node16 --moduleResolution node16 --lib ES2020,DOM --types node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-system-check scripts/system-check.ts src/lib/checks/*.ts src/lib/utils/env.ts && node .tmp-system-check/scripts/system-check.js
scripts.release:readiness: sh -c 'if command -v tsx >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsx scripts/release-readiness.ts; else npm run -s release:readiness:legacy; fi'
scripts.release:readiness:legacy: tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module node16 --moduleResolution node16 --lib ES2020,DOM --types node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-release-readiness scripts/release-readiness.ts && node .tmp-release-readiness/scripts/release-readiness.js
scripts.launch:gate: npm run system:check && npm run release:readiness
scripts.monitor:postdeploy: sh -c 'if command -v tsx >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsx scripts/post-deploy-monitor.ts; else npm run -s monitor:postdeploy:legacy; fi'
scripts.monitor:postdeploy:legacy: tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module node16 --moduleResolution node16 --lib ES2020,DOM --types node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-post-deploy-monitor scripts/post-deploy-monitor.ts && node .tmp-post-deploy-monitor/scripts/post-deploy-monitor.js
